case_title: HAJIME SADASUE VS. HOSONAGA INTERNATIONAL, INC. A CALIF. CORP. DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SADASUE, HAJIME AS TO DEFENDANT HOSONAGA INTERNATIONAL, INC. A CALIF. CORP. DBA KITS TRAVEL SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
